title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 394.310 - Chapter to be construed liberally
text:
394.310.  Chapter to be construed liberally. — This chapter shall be construed liberally.  The enumeration of any object, purpose, power, manner, method or thing shall not be deemed to exclude like or similar objects, purposes, powers, manners, methods or things.
(RSMo 1939 § 5416)
